name: OpenESEA Global ESG Framework
description: Core quantitative ESG assessment framework based on OpenESEA open standard methodology
author: SocialForger

blocks.name: General Data
blocks.description: Quantitative information regarding the social base and workforce structure of the organization.

blocks.name: Economy and Profit Policy
blocks.description: Financial metrics, accounting costs, and allocation rules for economic surpluses.

blocks.name: Equity and Democracy
blocks.description: Measures internal transparency, democratic participation, wage gaps, and gender equality.

blocks.name: Environmental Sustainability
blocks.description: Tracks energy efficiency, waste prevention, water footprint, and carbon neutrality plans.

blocks.name: Social Commitment and Cooperation
blocks.description: Evaluates ethical financing integration, network participation, and contributions to the commons.

blocks.name: Quality of Work
blocks.description: Assesses labor well-being, work-life balance frameworks, and emotional care spaces.
